title: How to Properly Reclaim Your Security Deposit from Your Landlord in Bole Before Moving Day
excerpt: Reclaim security deposit Bole: landlord handover, move-out inspection, photo documentation, tenant checklist, deposit dispute prevention before moving day Addis.
content:
How to properly reclaim your security deposit from your landlord in Bole before moving day

Bole compounds command premium rent and premium deposit amounts—two to six months common. Losing deposit to vague "repairs" after move is preventable heartbreak. Reclaiming security deposit requires move-out discipline before truck arrives: documented condition, witnessed walkthrough, and paper trail stronger than WhatsApp voice notes.

This guide helps Bole tenants reclaim security deposits properly before moving day.

Know your deposit terms

  • Amount and currency in lease.
  • Return timeline—30 or 60 days post handover typical in well-drafted leases.
  • Permitted deductions—damage beyond wear versus normal wear.
  • Interest clauses if any—rare but check.

Move-in baseline if you skipped it

Still photograph every room now—better late than never. Note pre-existing cracks, paint chips, appliance age. Timestamp photos; email copy to landlord creating record.

T-14 days pre-move cleaning and repair

Professional clean cheaper than disputed deduction. Patch small nail holes if lease requires. Replace burnt bulbs; descale fixtures. Leave appliances functional—non-working fridge triggers deduction.

Joint inspection protocol

Schedule landlord or agent present at empty unit. Room-by-room checklist signed both parties. Dispute items on form before keys handover—not after. Video walkthrough supplements photos.

Meter and utility finalization

Final electric and water readings photographed; accounts closed or transferred. Unpaid utility bills give landlord excuse to offset deposit.

Keys and handover document

All keys, remotes, access cards returned listed on form. Date and signature both sides. Copy before leaving compound gate.

If landlord delays or deducts unfairly

Written demand citing lease clause. Itemized deduction request—vague "cleaning 15,000 birr" challengeable. Mediation through compound management sometimes resolves Bole disputes faster than court.

Moving day coordination

Complete inspection before last carton leaves when possible—empty apartment easier to judge. Active Movers: schedule load after walkthrough slot if landlord inflexible on timing.

Conclusion

Reclaim Bole security deposit with baseline photos, professional clean, signed joint inspection, and meter closure—deposit returns to tenants who hand over keys with evidence, not hope.
author: Active Movers Team
